/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Add, ZeroMatrix
from sympy.matrices.expressions.matadd import MatAdd, canonicalize
z=ZeroMatrix(2,2)
for x in [Add(z,z), MatAdd(z,z), MatAdd(z,z).doit(), canonicalize(MatAdd(z,z))]:
 print(repr(x), type(x), getattr(x,'args',None), x == z)
print('z==0', z==0, 'isinstance', isinstance(z, ZeroMatrix))
PY
sed -n '950,1035p' sympy/matrices/expressions/matexpr.py; sed -n '1,80p' sympy/strategies/util.py"

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Add,ZeroMatrix
from sympy.matrices.expressions.matexpr import get_postprocessor
z=ZeroMatrix(2,2)
x=Add._from_args([z,z],False)
print(type(x),x.args)
f=get_postprocessor(Add)
print('f',repr(f(x)),type(f(x)),getattr(f(x),'args',None))
print('exec',repr(Add._exec_constructor_postprocessors(x)),type(Add._exec_constructor_postprocessors(x)))
PY
